banners.text: 🍳 I'm building a recipe app with no ads — looking for 50 early access testers. Claim your spot →

updates.title: Satle Update 22/07/2025
updates.body:
New Satles and bug fixes!

☀️ New daily puzzles have been added for the summer, along with several new cities and countries. I hope you'll enjoy.

I've also fixed a few bugs. Many players pointed out issues to me including:

  • 'Tripoli, Lebanon' was mislabelled as 'Tripoli, Libya'
  • South Korean cities were mislabelled as 'Korea'
  • A delay has been added to prevent multiple guesses from being submitted at once
  • Duplicate guesses are now detected and will show a warning

📱 Thanks for playing and check out the mobile app for a better experience on iOS and Android. Be well.

updates.title: Satle Update 16/03/2026
updates.body:
Spring Satles 2026!

🆕 86 new daily puzzles have been added featuring new cities and landmarks from around the world.

This update includes:

  • New countries across the world.
  • Iconic landmarks you will definitely recognize.
  • New cities that are home to some Satle guessers

🕊️ I am deeply saddened and disturbed by the many wars and violence that devastate the people and places that inspire this game. I pray that the world will come to peace and I hope that you are safe wherever you are.

Be well,
Brendan.
